title: i-power Battery Storage Systems catalogue overview
text:
i-power lithium battery storage systems catalogue overview.

Contains 6 lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4/LFP) battery models. All packs use built-in Battery Management Systems (BMS) for voltage, current, temperature and health monitoring.

Range spans a 48 VDC / 100 Ah (4.8 kWh) module for UPS and backup, high-voltage 409.6–512 VDC packs (20–51.2 kWh) for three-phase online UPS with 6C discharge, and a 512 VDC / 200 Ah (102.4 kWh, 184 kW) data-center system scalable to 16 cabinets in parallel. A modular 'S3' platform is also described for i-power UPS from 6 kW to 1200 kW. Applications include UPS backup, data centers, industrial/commercial sites, and renewable energy storage.

title: i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 48VDC-100Ah
text:
i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 48VDC-100Ah

Product group: Li-ion Battery 48VDC-100Ah  |  Lithium-ion Battery Packs
Models in this group: 1

Overview: The ENERGEN Lithium Iron Phosphate Battery Module is designed for storage and power supply application systems featuring an intelligent Battery Management System (BMS) that ensures enhanced safety, long cycle life, high energy density, wide temperature adaptability, and environmental protection.

This specification outlines the module’s type, size, structure, electro-mechanical performance service life, and BMS characteristics and may be updated according to specific customer requirements.

Key features: - Packed with high-performance LFP single cell, long life, safety and wide temperature range. High energy density, small size, light weight, no pollution. Packing with single cell container, fire retardant wire and copper connecting bar, stable and safe. Built-in BMS, with battery voltage, current, temperature and health management. More than 15 years design life, Stable performance, maintenance-free. Flexible customization of dimensions. Support Max 16pcs in parallel - LCD(optional) indicate the battery SOC and operating status. Model: RB-LI-48-100 Nominal Voltage: 48VDC Amp Hour Capacity: 100Ah

Typical applications: Storage Energy UPS Inverters Back-up Power Solutions Industrial Applications

title: i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 512VDC-100Ah
text:
i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 512VDC-100Ah

Product group: Li-ion Battery 512VDC-100Ah  |  Lithium-ion Battery Packs
Models in this group: 4

Overview: The ENERGEN Lithium Iron Phosphate Battery system is designed for 3-Phase online UPS applications guaranteeing safety and reliability. It supports a high 6C discharge current for 10 minute and is compatible with a wide range of high-voltage UPS systems.

Available in configurations up to 51.2KWH and scalable up to 8 cabinets, the battery system is protected by a BMS and Circuit Breaker, and offers a maximum supported UPS capacity up to 250KW.

Key features: - 6C discharge current for 10min application - +/ - Battery voltage with midpoint to support most of UPS battery configuration Suitable for wide range of UPS with high-voltage Up to 8 battery cabinets in parallel Lithium Iron battery LiFePO4 guarantees safety and reliability Models: RB-LI-410-50 RB-LI-512-50 RB-LI-410-100 RB-LI-512-100

Typical applications: 3-Phase UPS Systems Data Centers Industrial & Commercial Applications Renewable Energy Storage Systems

title: i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 480VDC-100Ah
text:
i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 480VDC-100Ah

Product group: Li-ion Battery 480VDC-100Ah  |  Lithium-ion Battery Packs
Models in this group: 0

Overview: "Carbon Peaking Carbon Neutrality" has become a global priority for all countries and industries and the concept of green energy saving has also been widely recognized by the people. Thanks the new infrastructure and 'dual carbon' goals, the lithium-ion battery industry has developed geometrically at an astonishing pace. Lithium ion phosphate walks in the forefront for its safety and stability

By following the nuclear-grade safety design concept and leveraging its over 30 years of professional experience in the power field. i-power deeply applied power electronics to the lithium ion battery technology and released lithium based solution with high safety and reliability

Key features: - The S3 smart backup lithium-ion battery system solution adopts the modular parallel design, - Safe, Smart and Simple, which can compatible with the full range of i-power UPS, with power ranging from 6kW to 1200kW. DC/DC isolated design combines with the physical isolated design. The fault battery module exits automatically without expanding the fault range Terminal zero voltage when shut down the system, no risk of short circuit shock Module fire protection Can quickly, accurately and effectively detect and extinguish the fire source will extinguish the fire in the initial stage PBMU-SBMU-MBMU, ensure the system safety and improve the system reliability On-line array insulation detection, prevention of battery insulation failure in advance Minute-level maintenance, reduce the OPEX cost Module design, support on-line expansion, can expand the capacity of modules or cabinets. Reduce the CAPEX cost

Typical applications: 3-Phase UPS Systems Data Centers Industrial & Commercial Applications Renewable Energy Storage Systems

metadata.applications: 3-Phase UPS Systems Data Centers Industrial & Commercial Applications Renewable Energy Storage Systems
metadata.data_quality_note: No model code, nominal voltage or Ah rating appears anywhere in this row. The name promises 480VDC / 100Ah but neither figure is in the source text - this is system-level copy for the "S3" platform, not a sellable SKU. Specs must be supplied before publishing.

title: i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 512VDC-200Ah
text:
i-power battery system overview — Li-ion Battery 512VDC-200Ah

Product group: Li-ion Battery 512VDC-200Ah  |  Lithium-ion Battery Packs
Models in this group: 1

Overview: The Energen RB-LI-512-200 is a high-voltage lithium iron phosphate (LFP) battery system purpose-built for resilient data center energy storage. It delivers a rated energy of 102.4kWh and a maximum discharge power of 184kW, ensuring robust backup for critical IT loads. The system utilizes a sophisticated three-level BMS architecture comprising BMU, BCU and BAU unit to provide a real time monitoring and comprehensive hardware protection

Designed for high reliability, it features independent charging circuits and is fully compatible with UPS and HVDC equipment. Safety is paramount, with integrated perfluorohexane fire protection. The scalable solution supports upto 16 cabinets in parallel and offers 10 years calendar life.

Key features: - High Safety: LFP battery cells, three-level BMS architecture, and certified by authoritative bodies. Long Life: Long calendar life design, lower TCO. High Reliability: Independent charging and discharging circuit, AC & DC dual power supply, ensuring constant connectivity. Advanced Monitoring: Features centralized monitoring through a Battery Administrative Unit (BAU) and supports unattended operation. High Compatibility: Highly compatible with various UPS and High Voltage Direct Current (HVDC) equipment. Model: RB-LI-512-200

Typical applications: 3-Phase UPS Systems Data Centers Industrial & Commercial Applications Renewable Energy Storage Systems
